name: Scrapper
description: A brawler who solves budget problems with elbows.
special: Junkyard Haymaker: higher base attack and sturdy early combat.

name: Former Mall Cop
description: Knows every dangerous shortcut between security kiosks and pretzel stands.
special: Radio Check: better defense and trap survivability.

name: Failed Magician
description: A stage performer whose tricks are mostly OSHA violations.
special: Misdirection: high luck for crits, loot, and traps.

name: Lunch Lady Avenger
description: Carries a ladle, a grudge, and institutional knowledge of mystery meat.
special: Second Serving: stronger sustain from food items.

name: IT Department Survivor
description: Survived printer drivers, password resets, and now whatever this is.
special: Have You Tried Rebooting It: balanced stats with extra luck.

name: Mascot Handler
description: Speaks fluent foam costume and knows when the eyes are following you.
special: Crowd Work: balanced fighter with odd sponsor luck.
